_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: Evidence-finalize TX House batch HD64-68 (hopper, little, shaheen, leach, spiller). All R incumbents who won/advanced the 2026-03-03 GOP primary -> general_candidate, faces a D in 2026-11-03 general. State tier, evidence_state. Every TRUE cites a vote/sponsorship/issue-group score/self-statement; documented intra-party deviations (Shaheen/Leach/Spiller all impeachment managers/voted to impeach AG Paxton; Leach death-penalty reformer; Shaheen narrowed SB17 farmland ban; Shaheen voted against HJR98 Article V) recorded in notes -> none map to a contrary RESOLUTE cell, so no fabricated FALSEs; unsupported cells null.

andy-hopper@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-64 (all Wise + part of Denton) since 2025-01-14; 'Jeffersonian conservative.' Won 2026-03-03 GOP primary vs Lisa McEntire, faces D Julie Evans 2026-11-03. Texas Right to Life 100%, Texas Alliance for Life 86%, Texas Values Action 100% (Faith & Family Champion), YCT 94, Texans for Fiscal Responsibility Index 99 (most fiscally conservative House member), NRA-PVF AQ, Gun Owners of America 2026 endorsement. Coauthored HB229 (What is a Woman Act), Stop Sexualizing Texas Kids package (HB100/HB4623/SB412/HB947), gold-currency HB1056 + HJR142 (abolish property taxes by 2030), election SJR37 (citizen-only voting), Texas Sovereignty Act (HB898/HB796), HB1982 (AG+sheriff sign-off on federal arrest warrants), HB2331 (state prosecution of human smugglers), SB8 (sheriff/ICE jail agreements), SB17 (foreign-adversary land ban). Voted AGAINST SB1 budget from the RIGHT (DEI funding + spending growth); one of 85 GOP yeas on SB2 vouchers (only Phelan+VanDeaver were GOP no-votes). No cross-party (progressive) deviations; only right-flank dissents. Per-member roll calls for SB10/SB11/SB12/SB13/HB1738/SB14 not independently pulled (LegiScan 403) -> aggregate TX Values 100% used for marriage/religious-liberty; remainder null.

mitch-little@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-65 (Denton Co., Lewisville/Flower Mound) since 2025-01-14; business trial attorney, served on AG Paxton's 2023 impeachment DEFENSE team (acquitted). Advanced 2026-03-03 GOP primary, faces D Detrick Deburr 2026-11-03. Texas Alliance for Life 96%, Texas Values Action 94% (Faith & Family Champion), Texas Taxpayers Fiscal Index 92; Texas Tribune ranks him among the most conservative House members. Voted FOR SB2 vouchers (confirmed roll call); authored SB17 amendments + House conferee (foreign-land ban, called the 100-year-lease carve-out 'a loophole you could drive a Mack truck through'); sponsored a ban on gender-transition care across all ages. Member, House Criminal Jurisprudence Committee. No cross-party deviations found. Freshman with limited roll-call history; election/justice/2A specifics are campaign-statement level (vague) -> nulled per discipline; SB10/SB11/HB229 individual votes not independently pulled (LegiScan 403) -> aggregate TX Values 94% used.

matt-shaheen@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-66 (Collin Co., Plano) since 2015-01-13; chairs the House Elections Committee. Ran unopposed in 2026-03-03 GOP primary, faces D Sandeep Srivastava 2026-11-03. Texas Alliance for Life 100%, Texas Right to Life 91 (2025), Texas Values Action 98% (Faith & Family Champion), JBS Freedom Index 79%. Supported SB8, HB229, SB1257 (Detransitioners), SB2, SB12, SB13, SB10, SB11; voted FOR HB1056 sound money, SB1070 (ERIC withdrawal), HB796 Texas Sovereignty Act, HB2837 (block firearm merchant codes), HB1927 permitless carry; voted AGAINST SB1 (2021 budget) + HB2 (2025 school funding) from the restraint side. DOCUMENTED DEVIATIONS (recorded for transparency, none map to a contrary RESOLUTE cell): voted to IMPEACH AG Paxton (2023); voted AGAINST HJR98 (Article V Convention of States); authored an SB17 amendment NARROWING the foreign-farmland ban to exempt lawfully-present adversary nationals (critics said it would 'gut' the bill) -> foreign-farmland cell left NULL not TRUE given that softening. Data-quality note: prior page's gun footnote cited 'tsrapac.com' (Tennessee rifle PAC) - a mis-citation; replaced with Freedom Index + TX Values legislator page.

jeff-leach@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-67 (Collin Co., Plano/Allen/McKinney) since 2013-01-08; 4th-term Chairman of House Judiciary & Civil Jurisprudence. Won 2026-03-03 GOP primary 64% vs Matt Thorsen, faces D Jordan Wheatley 2026-11-03. Texas Alliance for Life 100%, Texas Values Action 100% (Faith & Family Champion), Texas Right to Life named him a 'Pro-Life Champion of the 89th' (authored HB7 abortion-pill enforcement). Co-authored SB14 (transgender-minor care ban) + voted FOR; co-authored HB229 + HB1927 (constitutional carry); voted FOR SB2 vouchers, SB1070 (ERIC withdrawal), HB2837, higher-ed DEI ban. DOCUMENTED DEVIATIONS (recorded for transparency): voted to IMPEACH AG Paxton and served as a House impeachment MANAGER (2023); co-chairs the bipartisan Criminal Justice Reform Caucus, said he would support a death-penalty MORATORIUM (Lucio, 2022) and led the effort to halt Robert Roberson's execution (2024) — frames it as fixing a broken system, still backs capital punishment 'in the most heinous cases,' so public_justice left NULL not FALSE. Fiscal hawks have cooled: TFR career B (declining), JBS 50% (2023) for FOR votes on eminent domain/subsidized housing/teacher scholarships -> economic cells null. SB10/SB11/SB17 individual roll calls not independently pulled (LegiScan 403).

david-spiller@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-68 (12 rural N-Central TX counties: Brown/Comanche/Cooke/Eastland/Jack/Lampasas/Mills/Montague/San Saba/Shackelford/Throckmorton/Young), based in Jacksboro, since 2021-03-09 (special election replacing Drew Springer). Advanced 2026-03-03 GOP primary, faces D Jasmine Henderson 2026-11-03. Texas Alliance for Life 93%, Texas Right to Life 95 (89th), Texas Values Action 100% (Faith & Family Champion), YCT 90, TFR Fiscal Index C+/C- (weakest metric), NRA + Texas State Rifle Association endorsed. AUTHORED HB4 / carried+sponsored the enacted SB4 (2023 state illegal-entry crime) — signature legislation; co-author SB17 (foreign-land ban); authored HB43 (replace school M&O property tax), HB52 (felony penalties for illegal voting), HB65 (felony + deportation for crimes by undocumented). Voted FOR HB229, SB8, SB12, SB13, SB10, SB11, and FOR SB2 vouchers (notable break from rural-R skepticism). DOCUMENTED DEVIATION (recorded for transparency, not a contrary RESOLUTE cell): one of 12 House impeachment MANAGERS who prosecuted AG Paxton (2023), drawing a 2024 primary challenge. Anti-vaccine-mandate statement. 87th-session individual roll calls (HB1280/SB8 heartbeat/HB1927) not independently pulled (LegiScan 403) -> issue-group scores used.
